title: block (security)

posts.author: ysa (ysa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be good to add a feature that allows blocking a group so that other users cannot modify it. This is for security purposes and to ensure that all the information there remains unchanged

What are you trying to achieve

In terms of sensitive data, it’s important to have the assurance that a certain group of leads with information cannot be modified by any other user.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ysa,

welcome to the community!
keeping sensitive data protected is something a lot of teams think about.

While there isn’t a way to lock an entire group today, many teams handle this really well with a few simple workarounds:

  • Use a separate board for sensitive leads and control who can view or edit that board through permissions.

  • If you’re on Enterprise, you can use item-level permissions to restrict who can edit specific items, even if they’re on the same board.

  • You can also lock down key columns so only selected users can update sensitive information.

These options give you solid control over your data while still keeping collaboration smooth for the rest of the team.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: JDer (Daniel Jackman)
posts.cookedHtml: The workaround suggestions make sense, but if this is a common need maybe just build the feature instead of making people engineer around it.
